title: citrosma guianensis var. nuda
intro: Citrosma guianensis var. nuda, also known as the leafless citron tree, is a tropical plant native to the Guiana Shield region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various health issues due to its high content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Citrosma guianensis var. nuda include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal use, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
